Large fig tree growing behind the Hungry Horse Cafe. Access: Private.
Stadtplatz, 140 City Park Rd, Boerne, TX 78006, USA

Cibolo Nature Center, grape arbor near pavilion. Also, Mustangs are growing all along the left side of the trail leading from the pavilion down to the creek, among the trees there. Large and green at the beginning of May, not sure when they fully ripen. Access
City Park Rd, Boerne, TX 78006, USA

Lots of mustang grape growing on either side of the road. Look for broadleaf woody vines. on 6/20/2021 the fruit was mostly unripe with ~5-10% ready for picking. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
106 City Park Rd, Boerne, TX 78006, USA

lots of mustang grape growing thick all over the length of the fence. on 6/20/21 a quick check from my car didn't show any ripe fruit, but it had a lot of unripe grapes. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
Several old pecan trees growing on an empty lot. I have seen people gathering fallen nuts here before. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: November-January.
